c74object.name: dk.realtimeframe~
c74object.description: The dk.realtimeframe~ object is the counterpart to dk.onsetframe~ where instead of outputting the frame to analyzed based on onset detection, dk.realtimeframe~ spits out a constant stream of frame values to analyze enabling realtime analysis of multiple descriptor types that remain in sync.
c74object.discussion: The underlying timing is sample-accurate (using phasor~), but the timing at output may vary slightly as it is converted to message rate.

outlet.digest: Sample position to beging analysis from
outlet.description: Sample position to analyze in rolling buffer~ along with buffer~ name.

attribute.name: rate
attribute.digest: Rate at which the frame is output (also sets the delay to make sure the window is analyzed)
attribute.description: Rate at which the frame is output (also sets the delay to make sure the window is analyzed) (in samples).
